headline: Ottoman Empire
description: The Ottoman Empire (1299-1922) was one of history's longest-lasting empires, spanning Southeast Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. Founded by Osman I, peaked under Suleiman the Magnificent (1520-1566). Istanbul (formerly Constantinople) was its capital. Dissolved after WWI, succeeded by modern Turkey.
